title: stakeholder-update-composer-tool
description: OpenSpec: openspec/changes/stakeholder-update-composer-tool/. Founder ring. Depends on the data contract; reads OKR Organizer/Cadence Kit/OKR Check-In stores read-only.

title: donut-crm-test-register
description: OpenSpec: openspec/changes/donut-crm-test-register/. QA ring flagship tool. Depends on the data contract; reads Spec Builder + Vertical Slicer via isolated adapter.

title: okr-check-in-tool
description: OpenSpec: openspec/changes/okr-check-in-tool/. Stage 06 Feedback & Adoption, loop-closer. Depends on the data contract AND okr-organizer-tool (writes drafts through its store).

title: cadence-reflection-kit-tool
description: OpenSpec: openspec/changes/cadence-reflection-kit-tool/. Stage 05 Delivery Cadence. Depends on the data contract.

title: backlog-prioritizer-tool
description: OpenSpec: openspec/changes/backlog-prioritizer-tool/. Stage 04 Backlog. Depends on the data contract; reads Vertical Slicer via isolated adapter.

title: vertical-slicer-tool
description: OpenSpec: openspec/changes/vertical-slicer-tool/. Stage 03 Definition. Depends on the data contract; reads Spec Builder via isolated adapter (degrades gracefully if absent).

title: donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract
description: Foundational OpenSpec change at openspec/changes/donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract/ — shared store contract (ProductRecord, QuarterRef, cross-tool ref shapes, createToolStore factory) all 8 pipeline tools build on. Must implement first; nothing else can start.
close_reason: Implementation already complete: pipeline-store.ts (329 lines) with all contract types, product store, quarter helpers, tool store factory. ost-store.ts already migrated onto factory (D9). pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Donut CRM pipeline tool: Stakeholder Update Composer
description: Build the Stakeholder Update Composer tool (React island + localStorage store on key pm-update-v1) as its own OpenSpec change. Contract of record: openspec/changes/donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract/design.md — build the store via createToolStore from src/utils/pipeline-store.ts, use the D4 storage-key/id-prefix tables and the D2 reference shapes.
acceptance_criteria: Own OpenSpec change with proposal/design/specs/tasks; store built on createToolStore; design.md cites the pipeline data contract; pnpm check and pnpm build pass.

title: Course: Testing Donut CRM for the AI Era
description: QA ring companion capstone, same case/timeline as the PO course. Blocked by Test Register, Spec Builder, Vertical Slicer, Cadence & Reflection Kit.

title: Course: Two Quarters at Donut CRM
description: Capstone, PO/PM ring. 12 chapters spanning all 6 pipeline stages. Blocked by all 8 tools since each chapter embeds one.

title: Article: When a deal wants to jump the backlog — use the matrix, not politics
description: Sales cross-cut. Walks through Backlog Prioritizer's kill/probe queue.

title: Article: Where quality lives in Scrum vs. Kanban vs. Scrumban
description: QA ring, ties into the Stage 05 first-principles reframe. Needs both Cadence Kit and Test Register.

title: Article: From acceptance criteria to Playwright spec — closing the Definition-to-test gap
description: QA ring. Walks through Test Register consuming Spec Builder's AC and Vertical Slicer's stories.

title: Article: Demo day as the OKR checkpoint, not a show-and-tell
description: Stage 05. Walks through Cadence & Reflection Kit's demo checklist tied to an OKR key result.

title: Article: Choosing a cadence for Donut CRM — why scrumban fits a CRM with both roadmap work and reactive support tickets
description: Stage 05. Walks through Cadence & Reflection Kit's mode choice.

title: Article: First principles of the delivery layer — what sprints, kanban, and scrumban are each solving for
description: Stage 05 anchor. Best written with Cadence & Reflection Kit's mode picker as the concrete artifact.

title: Article: Prioritizing against the OKR, not against the loudest stakeholder
description: Stage 04. Walks through Backlog Prioritizer plotting against an active OKR.

title: Article: Reading your PM's OKR update — what to ask, what to leave alone
description: Founder ring. Walks through Stakeholder Update Composer's output.

title: Article: Test registers for the AI era — what to track when AI writes (and rewrites) your Playwright specs
description: QA ring flagship article. Walks through Test Register's staleness/drift behavior.

title: Article: Adoption isn't a launch-week metric, it's a season
description: Stage 06. Walks through OKR Check-In's multi-snapshot trend view.

title: Article: Closing the loop — did the key result actually move?
description: Stage 06. Walks through OKR Check-In's quarter-close ritual.

title: Article: Retros that produce one action, not eleven
description: Stage 05. Walks through Cadence & Reflection Kit's one-action retro log.

title: Article: Vertical slicing — turning one big feature into ten shippable ones
description: Stage 03. Walks through Vertical Slicer's pattern-assignment interaction.

title: Article: PRD, pitch, or story map — naming the job before naming the artifact
description: Stage 03. Walks through Spec Builder's three-format picker directly.

title: Article: Who Does What By How Much — the bridge from OKRs to the Opportunity Solution Tree
description: Stage 01. References OKR Organizer tool as the practical artifact.

title: Pipeline data export/import (JSON download of one product's pipeline)
description: Deferred Open Question from openspec/changes/donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract/design.md: export/import a whole product's pipeline data as JSON, useful for the Donut CRM running-case demo. Explicitly a non-goal of the contract change; needs its own proposal.
acceptance_criteria: Own OpenSpec change; round-trips every pm-*-v1 store plus ost-trees-v1 for one productId; import is additive and never clobbers unrelated products.

title: pipeline-tools-chrome: shared stage nav + product switcher for the Donut CRM pipeline tools
description: Deferred Open Question from openspec/changes/donut-crm-pipeline-data-contract/design.md: the eight pipeline tool pages likely want shared chrome (stage nav, product switcher island). UI only — the data contract already provides listProducts/resolveActiveProduct/setActiveProductId. Pick this up from the first tool proposal that needs it.
acceptance_criteria: Own OpenSpec change; shared chrome component(s) under src/components/tools/; uses the pipeline-store product APIs, no parallel product state.

title: Article: What a PO absorbs vs. hands off, by team size — and the hat nobody actually wears
description: Derived from the multiple-hats-by-team-size matrix; QA-orphaning-at-8-people is the hook. No tool dependency.
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Article: Mining support tickets into the Opportunity Solution Tree, not just a bug queue
description: Support cross-cut. No tool dependency (OST tool already built).
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Article: Where discovery interviews and marketing research are the same conversation
description: Marketing cross-cut. No tool dependency.
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Article: When you need a dedicated BA, and when the PO already does this job
description: BA cross-cut. No tool dependency.
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Article: When to sit in on discovery, not just the demo
description: Founder ring. No tool dependency (OST tool already exists/built).
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Article: Cascading OKRs to department and product without a status report
description: Stage 01. No tool dependency.
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Article: Before you write an OKR — OKRs vs. Rocks vs. a bare North Star
description: Stage 01 first-principles reframe. No tool dependency — conceptual.
close_reason: Article written and saved. pnpm check passes with 0 errors.

title: Relabel existing Donut CRM-lineage posts to consistent naming
description: Body-text relabel to Donut CRM (locked URLs stay as-is) for: 2025-08-25 commands-that-write-prds post, 2025-02-06 user-story-mapping post, 2021-05-21 agreement-certainty-matrix post, 2025-04-10 backlog-cleanup post. No tool dependency.
close_reason: Relabeled recap_crm to Donut CRM in body text of 2021-05-21 post (the only one of the 4 that contained a product name). The other 3 posts (2025-08-25, 2025-02-06, 2025-04-10) are generic PM content with no product name references to relabel.
